title: Ravishwarar Temple
tagline: Ravishwarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Ravishwarar Temple is a Hindu temple in Chennai, India.
overview.description: Ravishwarar Temple is a Hindu temple in Chennai, India. Built during the Chola period, the temple is dedicated to Shiva. It is located at Murthy Iyengar Street in the northern neighbourhood of Vyasarpadi.

topPlaces.name: Vyasarpadi
topPlaces.description: Vyasarpadi is a neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is located within Chennai district.

topPlaces.name: Sathiya Moorthy Nagar
topPlaces.description: Sathiamurthy Nagar is located in the Vyasarpadi area of Chennai city in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: 2005 November Chennai stampede
topPlaces.description: The 2005 November Chennai stampede incident happened on 6 November 2005 in a school in Vyasarpadi on the outskirts of Chennai where relief supplies were distributed by the state government for people affected by severe flooding. There were 6 deaths in the accident, which left another 12 injured.

topPlaces.name: M. K. B. Nagar
topPlaces.description: MKB Nagar, also known as Maha kavi Bharathi Nagar, is mainly a residential locality in the northern part of the metropolitan city of Chennai, Tamil Nadu state, India. It was earlier known as Tamil Nadu Housing Board Colony until 1982.

topPlaces.name: Moolakothalam
topPlaces.description: Moolakothalam is a neighbourhood in Chennai district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Moolakothalam has a dry fish market which functions for more than 50 years.

topPlaces.name: Pattalam, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Pattalam, is a developed residential area in Central Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India. The area is famous for its Hanuman temple which occupies the center of the place; Ellaiamman Temple and Siddhi Buddhi Vinayagar cum Lakshmi Amman Temple, all the above mentioned three temples are under the control of Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department, Government of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Korukkupet
topPlaces.description: Korukkupet is a neighbourhood in the northern part of Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It is served by the Korukkupet railway station.

topPlaces.name: Basin bridge
topPlaces.description: Basin bridge is a neighbourhood in Chennai district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. It is located at an altitude of about 28 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 13°06′23.5″N 80°16′31.2″E (i.e., 13.106535°N, 80.275340°E).

items.note: Vyasarpadi is a neighbourhood of Chennai, India. It is located within Chennai district.
Sathiamurthy Nagar is located in the Vyasarpadi area of Chennai city in Tamil Nadu.

The 2005 November Chennai stampede incident happened on 6 November 2005 in a school in Vyasarpadi on the outskirts of Chennai where relief supplies were distributed by the state government for people affected by severe flooding. There were 6 deaths in the accident, which left another 12 injured.

The area is famous for its Hanuman temple which occupies the center of the place; Ellaiamman Temple and Siddhi Buddhi Vinayagar cum Lakshmi Amman Temple, all the above mentioned three temples are under the control of Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department, Government of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ravishwarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ravishwarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ravishwarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ravishwarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ravishwarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ravishwarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ravishwarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ravishwarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vyasarpadi, Sathiya Moorthy Nagar, 2005 November Chennai stampede, M. K. B. Nagar, Moolakothalam.
